package rulefixtures

// scenario for bufio_reader_missing_for_small_read_loop: File or socket reads inside loops without visible bufio buffering.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: hot_path; severity: info.
type Rule343NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario343Negative(records []Rule343NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
